title: Brendan Greeley on the Real 500-Year History of the Dollar | Odd Lots
title_cn: 布伦丹·格里利 (Brendan Greeley) 谈美元的 500 年真实历史 | Brendan Greeley零股
summary: We love talking about money. And of course we love talking about the dollar, in all its varieties, from bank deposits to eurodollars to stablecoins. But what fundamentally is a dollar and who actually controls it? Before you can even talk about any of that, you need to understand how the dollar was born. Brendan Greeley argues the dollar is a lot older than you might suspect: It is a 500-year-old idea. The word itself has an incredible etymology: It's derived from German, but refers to a Spanish currency made from silver found in Mexico. The story of the dollar, Greeley tells us, goes way beyond the US and implicates the whole world. Our conversation coincides with the release of Greely's new book, 'The Almighty Dollar: 500 Years of the World's Most Powerful Money.' (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: We love talking about money. And of course, we love talking about the dollar, in all its varieties — from bank deposits to eurodollars to stablecoins. But what fundamentally is a dollar and who actually controls it? To understand these questions, you really need to understand how the dollar was born. Journalist (and current Ph.D. candidate in financial history) Brendan Greeley argues not only that the dollar is older than you might suspect, but that the dollar long precedes the United States its

title: Global Interest in India’s Affordable Housing
title_cn: 全球对印度经济适用房的兴趣
summary:
Global investors are increasing long‑term commitments to India’s affordable and middle‑income housing sector, despite currency pressures and near‑term market volatility. This segment examines why foreign capital is targeting Indian real estate and private credit, and how infrastructure spending and demographic trends are shaping demand.
With a persistent housing supply gap and rising urbanisation, the focus is on risk‑adjusted returns, private credit, and the role of government policy in supporting development. Vipul Roongta, CEO of HDFC Capital Advisors, joined Haslinda Amin on Insight with Haslinda Amin to discuss fundraising trends, deployment plans, and the outlook for India’s housing market. (Source: Bloomberg)

She speaks with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts from the sidelines of the UBS Asian Investment Conference in Hong Kong. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Chip Giant CXMT’s IPO Revives Memories of Past Market Tops
title_cn: 中国芯片巨头长鑫存储IPO重温昔日市场巅峰
summary: The buzz surrounding ChangXin Memory Technologies Ltd.’s anticipated IPO is also triggering anxiety in parts of China’s market, where investors recall earlier mega-deals that absorbed vast amounts of liquidity and marked turning points for equities.

title: AI Boom Fuels Record $14.5 Billion in Taiwan Tech Firm Borrowing
title_cn: 人工智能热潮推动台湾科技公司借贷创纪录的 145 亿美元
summary: Taiwanese tech firms have completed a record $14.5 billion of debt deals so far this year, as they race to secure financing to meet soaring demand for artificial intelligence capacity.

title: Swiggy CEO Vows to Stay Out of Amazon-Walmart India Spending War
title_cn: Swiggy 首席执行官发誓不会卷入亚马逊与沃尔玛印度的支出战争
summary: Swiggy Ltd., one of India’s top quick commerce firms, plans to restrain spending and focus on profitability while deeper-pocketed rivals Flipkart and Amazon.com Inc. intensify efforts to shrink delivery times and expand discounts.

title: Synopsys Settles with Elliott, Names Firm’s Jesse Cohn to Board
title_cn: Synopsys 与 Elliott 达成和解，任命该公司的 Jesse Cohn 为董事会成员
summary: Synopsys Inc. said it has reached an agreement with Elliott Investment Management and is appointing the activist investor’s Jesse Cohn to the chip-design software maker’s board.

title: HP Gives Profit Outlook That Fails to Ease Chip Cost Concern
title_cn: 惠普公布的利润展望未能缓解芯片成本担忧
summary: HP Inc. gave a profit forecast for the current quarter that signaled the company continues to contend with a dramatic increase in memory chip prices.

title: Ghanaians Evacuated from South Africa Amid Anti-Immigrant Tumult
title_cn: 在反移民骚乱中加纳人从南非撤离
summary: The Ghanaian government repatriated 295 of its citizens from South Africa on Wednesday amid an ongoing wave of anti-immigrant protests in Africa’s largest economy.

title: EU Warns of Russian Trap Over Reopening Talks With the Kremlin
title_cn: 欧盟警告俄罗斯与克里姆林宫重启谈判可能落入陷阱
summary: The European Union risks walking into a Russian trap by discussing the possible appointment of a special envoy to negotiate with President Vladimir Putin, the bloc’s top diplomat said.

title: Nigerian Opposition Leader Set for Seventh Presidential Run
title_cn: 尼日利亚反对派领袖将第七次竞选总统
summary: Nigeria’s main opposition party picked Atiku Abubakar as its flagbearer in January’s presidential elections, setting up a rematch of his 2023 contest with incumbent leader Bola Tinubu.

title: US Strikes Iran Targets Near Hormuz With No Accord in Sight
title_cn: 美国袭击霍尔木兹附近的伊朗目标，但没有达成任何协议
summary: The US struck Iranian military targets for the second time this week and Kuwait said it responded to missile and drone threats, highlighting the fragility of the ceasefire and the challenge of forging a peace accord that would restore global energy flows.

title: Iran War: US Launches Strikes as Trump Rejects Easing Sanctions | Daybreak Europe 05/28/2026
title_cn: 伊朗战争：特朗普拒绝放松制裁，美国发动打击欧洲黎明 05/28/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

Stocks and bonds fell while oil climbed after the US carried out airstrikes on an Iranian military site and imposed new sanctions to prevent Tehran from profiting from vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz, highlighting the fragility of recent diplomatic momentum.

Salesforce gave a revenue outlook for the current period that fell just short of analysts’ estimates, unnerving investors already concerned about the possibility that artificial intelligence will disrupt the software business.

Today's guest: Trevor Charsley, Corpay, Senior Technical Strategist. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Files Fresh $10 Billion Suit Over WSJ’s Epstein Story
title_cn: 特朗普因《华尔街日报》报道爱泼斯坦的故事提起新的 100 亿美元诉讼
summary: President Donald Trump filed a new version of his $10 billion libel lawsuit against the Wall Street Journal and its parent company News Corp. over an article about his alleged close ties to Jeffrey Epstein, after an earlier version of the suit was tossed out by a judge.

title: Philippines Charges Senator Over Flood Infrastructure Scandal
title_cn: 菲律宾因洪水基础设施丑闻指控参议员
summary: The Philippines’ anti-graft watchdog charged Senator Jinggoy Estrada with plunder and graft for his alleged involvement in a multibillion-peso corruption scheme that slowed economic growth and outraged the public.

title: Oil Jumps as Gulf Attacks Threaten Ceasefire
title_cn: 海湾袭击威胁停火，油价飙升
summary: Oil spiked after renewed attacks in the Persian Gulf and a fresh push by the US to hurt Iran with sanctions. The conflict in the Middle East has choked off vital energy flows, with millions of barrels of daily oil supply shut-in across the region. Bloomberg's Rong Wei Neo reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Singapore Top Envoy Meets Kim Jong Un’s Close Aide on Rare Trip
title_cn: 新加坡高级特使罕见访问金正恩亲密助手
summary: Singapore’s foreign minister held talks with a top aide to North Korean leader Kim Jong Un in a rare visit to Pyongyang, urging the isolated state to keep channels for dialogue open with the outside world.

title: Vietnam, Thailand Agree to Deepen Ties in To Lam’s First Visit
title_cn: 越南与泰国同意在杜林首次访华期间深化两国关系
summary: Vietnam and Thailand agreed to deepen security and defense ties, as well as cooperation on technology sharing and green energy, during To Lam’s first visit to Thailand as Vietnam’s top leader.

title: Democrats Lose Court Bid to Block Trump’s Mail-In Ballot Limits
title_cn: 民主党在阻止特朗普邮寄选票限制的法庭诉讼中失败
summary: Congressional Democratic leaders lost a bid for a court order to block the Trump administration from prohibiting mail-in voting for anyone not on a pre-approved list of citizens compiled by the Department of Homeland Security.

title: US Strikes Iran Targets as Trump Vows to 'Watch Over' Hormuz
title_cn: 特朗普发誓“看守”霍尔木兹，美国袭击伊朗目标
summary: The US carried out airstrikes on an Iranian military site and imposed new sanctions to prevent Tehran from profiting from vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz. Hours earlier, President Donald Trump asserted that no one nation would control the vital waterway, highlighting a key obstacle in resolving the conflict. Bloomberg's Jill Disis reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: As Europe Weighs Less Reliance on US Military, Asia Doubles Down
title_cn: 随着欧洲减少对美国军事的依赖，亚洲加倍努力
summary: Tension between the US and other NATO members is driving countries in Europe to consider collective defense that’s less reliant on America - yet the picture is much different in Asia.

title: Thai Court Acquits Banned Politician of Royal Insult Charge
title_cn: 泰国法院宣判因皇家侮辱罪而被禁止的政治家无罪
summary: A Thai court dismissed a high-profile royal defamation case against banned Thai opposition figure Thanathorn Juangroongruangkit, removing a hurdle for his potential return to politics.

title: CFTC Moves to Undo Settlement That Had Gemini Paying $5 Million
title_cn: CFTC 撤销 Gemini 支付 500 万美元的和解协议
summary: The US Commodity Futures Trading Commission and Gemini Trust Co., led by the billionaire Winklevoss brothers, want to dissolve a 2025 settlement that resulted in the cryptocurrency exchange agreeing to pay $5 million to end an agency lawsuit.

title: Japan Plans ‘Bridging Bonds’ to Fund Investment Initiatives
title_cn: 日本计划发行“过渡债券”为投资计划提供资金
summary: Japan plans to use so-called bridging bonds to help finance Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi’s investment plans, the government’s top spokesperson said, a development that comes as investors are already concerned about more debt issuance.

title: China Says It Drove Off Dutch Warship Sailing in South China Sea
title_cn: 中国称其击退了在南海航行的荷兰军舰
summary: China said it expelled a Dutch warship that entered its waters, a rare incident between the two navies that underscores tensions over contested boundaries in the South China Sea.

title: Trump’s Bind Deepens With Hormuz Shut and Hawks Pushing War
title_cn: 随着霍尔木兹海峡关闭和鹰派推动战争，特朗普的束缚加深
summary: As President Donald Trump continues to suggest a deal with Iran is close, he finds himself caught between two extremes: Tehran’s demand for financial relief and an end to attacks, and pressure from Republican hawks to “finish the job” — or at least not to sign a bad deal.

title: US Strikes Iran Targets as Trump Vows to ‘Watch Over’ Hormuz
title_cn: 特朗普发誓“看守”霍尔木兹，美国袭击伊朗目标
summary: President Donald Trump asserted that no one nation would control the vital Strait of Hormuz waterway, highlighting a key sticking point in resolving the war with Iran.

title: Trump: 'Not Satisfied Yet' on Iran Deal | Balance of Power: Late Edition 5/27/2026
title_cn: 特朗普：对伊朗协议“尚未满意”权力平衡：最新版 2026 年 5 月 27 日
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Dana Stroul, The Washington Institute for Near East Policy Research Director, discusses President Trump denying an Iranian report on a drafted deal to re-open the Strait of Hormuz, Jessica Taylor, Cook Political Report US Senate and Governors Editor, talks about the Texas Republican primary race where Attorney General Ken Paxton defeated incumbent Senator John Cornyn, and Representative Joe Morelle (D-NY), Ranking Member of the House Administration Committee and Vice Ranking Member of the House Appropriations Committee, says New York Democrats are considering two constitutional redistricting options in response to GOP-led map changes in states like Texas. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Denies Iran Report on Draft Deal to Re-Open Hormuz
title_cn: 美国否认伊朗关于重新开放霍尔木兹海峡协议草案的报告
summary: Dana Stroul, The Washington Institute for Near East Policy Research Director, discusses the Trump Administration denying an Iranian report on a drafted deal to re-open the Strait of Hormuz. Stroul also says other countries are losing faith in the US and are making their own deals with Iran to transit the Strait of Hormuz. She speaks with Kailey Leinz on Bloomberg's Balance of Power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Takaichi to Meet Philippines’ Marcos to Deepen Security Ties
title_cn: 高市将与菲律宾马科斯会面以深化安全关系
summary: Philippine President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. is set to meet Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi on Thursday in Tokyo, as shared concerns over an increasingly assertive China accelerate a deepening of security ties between the two Asian nations.

title: Trump Disputes Iran’s Hormuz Control
title_cn: 特朗普质疑伊朗对霍尔木兹的控制
summary: President Donald Trump asserted that no one nation would control the vital Strait of Hormuz waterway, highlighting a key sticking point in resolving the war with Iran. Bloomberg's Romy Varghese breaks down the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rep. Morelle: Democrats Will ‘Finish’ Redistricting Fight
title_cn: 众议员莫雷尔：民主党将“完成”选区重新划分斗争
summary: Representative Joe Morelle (D-NY), Ranking Member of the House Administration Committee and Vice Ranking Member of the House Appropriations Committee, says New York Democrats are considering two constitutional redistricting options in response to GOP-led map changes in states like Texas, confirming an earlier report from POLITICO. He says the Iran war is worsening affordability pressures through higher gas, food and goods prices, and criticizes the Defense Department for failing to provide Congress with a detailed cost estimate or supplemental funding request. Rep. Morelle also rejects a proposed anti-weaponization fund tied to ICE and CBP funding, calling it "a massive slap in the face to the American people." He speaks with Kailey Leinz on Bloomberg's Balance of Power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ex-President Biden Sues to Stop DOJ Sharing Interview Tapes
title_cn: 前总统拜登起诉阻止司法部分享采访录音
summary: Former President Joe Biden is suing the US Justice Department to block officials from sharing audio recordings and interview transcripts he gave for a memoir project with Republicans in Congress and a conservative advocacy group.

title: Paxton, Talarico to Battle for US Senate Seat
title_cn: 帕克斯顿、塔拉里科将争夺美国参议院席位
summary: Jessica Taylor, Cook Political Report US Senate and Governors Editor, talks about the Texas Republican primary race where Attorney General Ken Paxton defeated incumbent Senator John Cornyn, and how it sets up a midterm election between Paxton and Democratic state representative James Talarico. She speaks with Kailey Leinz on Bloomberg's Balance of Power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Marcos’ Sister Flags Support for Duterte Ahead of Senate Trial
title_cn: 马科斯的姐妹在参议院审判前支持杜特尔特
summary: Senators seeking to lock impeached Philippine Vice President Sara Duterte out of politics for good may face an uphill battle with one of her staunchest supporters calling the movement against her family “insane and wicked.”

title: New York Lawmakers Approve Second-Home Tax in State Budget
title_cn: 纽约立法者批准州预算中的第二套房税
summary: New York lawmakers approved a revenue package for the state budget that includes a new surcharge on pricey second homes in the city, but omits a proposal to tax all-cash property purchases.
